form.formComment: Won two starts back over 340m at this track. Last start he finished 5th over 340m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (20.25) behind Tralee Nadia in a Grade 5 on April 1. Draw likely to suit. Must be included.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (19.93) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Yet to win but has placed five times from this draw. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Should get a clear run from the wide draw. Wasn't impressive last start but does have a great record at this track and distance, forgive the latest run. Has solid claims on her best form.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished sixth over 340m at this track, beaten 10 lengths. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Missed the frame when eighth (27.11) at this track at last run and returns here after a three-and-a-half months break. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Tough line-up and place prospects appear best.
